_note: Per-token energy coefficients (joules). Sourced where possible from the HuggingFace AI Energy Score corpus and published vendor reports. Where no public number exists the coefficient is documented as 'vendor-undisclosed' and derived from order-of-magnitude analysis (model parameter count * dense-FLOPs-per-token * datacenter PUE / per-token throughput). All numbers are ESTIMATES; the JouleCost is always tagged JouleSource::Estimated.

claude-3-5-sonnet.source: HuggingFace AI Energy Score + Anthropic published reports (claude-3.5-sonnet, 2024)

claude-3-opus.source: vendor-undisclosed; estimator derived from parameter-count ratio vs claude-3.5-sonnet

claude-3-haiku.source: vendor-undisclosed; estimator derived from claude-3-haiku FLOPs/token reports

gpt-4.1.source: vendor-undisclosed; estimator derived from gpt-4o coefficient + OpenAI capacity disclosures

o3.source: vendor-undisclosed; estimator inflated for hidden reasoning-token expansion (4-8x output token amplification)

gemini-1.5-pro.source: Google Sustainability Report 2024 + HuggingFace AI Energy Score (gemini-1.5)

mixtral-8x7b.source: HuggingFace AI Energy Score (mixtral-8x7b) + Mistral published efficiency reports
